## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `bun run build` passes (TypeScript typecheck + build)
- [ ] `bun run format:check` passes (Prettier)
- [ ] `bun run fmt:rust:check` passes (rustfmt) — _if I touched Rust_
- [ ] `cargo clippy` is clean — _if I touched Rust_
- [ ] User-facing strings are in English
- [ ] I added/updated a note in `.development-history/` if this changes a feature
